name: blundr-v2.7-visual-clean-continuation-fix
base: v2.7 professional repair plus final clean temporal visuals
scope: visual layer preserved, continuation handoff bug fixed
fixes: Legal user moves are accepted when restricted mode has no saved training move.
No-saved-user-move positions automatically switch into continuation mode.
Opponent-side book end falls through into Lichess/engine continuation instead of getting stuck.
Continue vs Bot now forces continuation mode into the opponent move function and avoids stale restricted-mode closure.
Final clean temporal visuals and forced knight polyline rendering are preserved.
vercel: Next.js config included; no outputDirectory/dist setting.
